evals.prompt: Run QA on forms.html to check if the implementation matches VA.gov BIO patterns. The file is at /sessions/eager-nice-euler/mnt/Aquia Form Builder/forms.html
evals.expected_output: A structured QA report covering design tokens, component structure, Unicode characters, ARIA attributes, and page flow logic with severity-rated findings
expectations: Report checks design token values in :root against VADS spec
Report verifies the Continue button arrow is U+203A and marks it as correct
Report verifies the Back button arrow is U+2039 and marks it as correct
Report checks that action link uses var(--vads-color-success) green color
Report verifies progress bar is not shown on intro page
Report checks ARIA attributes on review accordion headers
Report includes severity levels (CRITICAL/WARNING/INFO) for each finding
Report ends with a summary including pass/fail counts and priorities

evals.prompt: I just updated the buttons in forms.html. Can you QA check the button components specifically? File is at /sessions/eager-nice-euler/mnt/Aquia Form Builder/forms.html
evals.expected_output: A focused QA report on button components (primary, back, action link) checking CSS, Unicode arrows, hover states, and accessibility
expectations: Report focuses on button-related components rather than full form audit
Report checks Continue button CSS properties against spec
Report checks Back button CSS properties against spec
Report verifies action link green color and circular badge
Report checks button accessibility (text content, keyboard interaction)

evals.prompt: QA the forms.html file and pay special attention to whether form fields are properly rendering. Path: /sessions/eager-nice-euler/mnt/Aquia Form Builder/forms.html
evals.expected_output: QA report with emphasis on form field rendering — input styling, labels, required indicators, select elements, and field-schema alignment
expectations: Report checks text input border styling (2px solid var(--vads-color-base-dark))
Report checks required field indicator styling
Report verifies form fields have associated labels
Report includes general QA checks beyond just fields
